summary_en: 150,000 shares acquired for ¥315.6M on 26-May-2026 via ToSTNeT-3. Represents 1.18% of S/O. Completes authorization approved by Board on 25-May-2026 (limit ¥400M, 150,000 shares).
title_en: Announcement of Acquisition Results and Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition via ToSTNeT-3 Off-Hours Matching Trade
translation_en_brief: Meiji Electric Industries completed acquisition of 150,000 treasury shares on 26 May 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 (Tokyo Stock Exchange off-hours matching system). Total acquisition cost was ¥315.6M, representing 1.18% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The Board had authorized this program on 25 May 2026 with an upper limit of ¥400M and 150,000 shares. The company states the acquisition was undertaken to execute flexible capital policy in response to changes in the operating environment. This announcement confirms the program is now complete.
